title: Papa: RESEARCH BASE!
prompt: Composition is anchored by @ep12-c12-base2. Animate the still gently — every figure stays in their EXACT physical kneeling spot throughout the entire 10s. There are EXACTLY 3 people in the entire frame, no extras, no additional spawns. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Papa softly spreads both arms slightly wider in a friendly drawing-an-invisible-castle dad-gesture, warm cheerful theatrical face. Papa (cheerful warm theatrical dad-voice): "You know what every rescue mission needs? A RE-SEARCH. BASE!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara's eyes go huge with cheerful awe, mouth opens softly. Sara (cheerful kid-voice): "A research BASE?!" Eva nods softly with her chin moving up and down, beaming bright. Eva (cheerful nodding): "Like real explorers!" Papa softly closes his arms back gently in. Papa (warm cheerful nod): "Bucket. Shovel. Let's GO." All three keep their kneeling/crouching positions throughout — no standing, no walking, no leaping. Calm cheerful kid-show family energy. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing, no shifting, no color drift.
